nodes.context: Outlaw motorcycle club based in New Zealand and Australia, involved in drug dealing, theft, murder.
Outlaw motorcycle club involved in a violent clash with Highway 61 in 1975.
Motorcycle club that clashed with Highway 61 at the 1979 Nelson Mardi Gras.
Motorcycle club; a member was murdered by Highway 61 members in 1997.

edges.evidence_quote: One of the earliest documented violent clashes involving the Highway 61 Motorcycle Club occurred on 29 December 1975, in Auckland's Mount Eden suburb, where 19-year-old club member Bradley Earl Haora was beaten and then fatally shot in the head with a sawn-off shotgun during a confrontation with Hells Angels members at a Highway 61 property.
edges.context: Highway 61 and Hells Angels engaged in a violent clash in 1975, resulting in fatalities and injuries.

edges.evidence_quote: At the 1979 Nelson Mardi Gras event the Lost Breed clashed with members of Highway 61 from Wellington.
edges.context: Highway 61 and Lost Breed clashed at the 1979 Nelson Mardi Gras, resulting in injuries and arrests.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1997, Highway 61 members were convicted of murdering a member of the New Zealand Nomads.
edges.context: Highway 61 members murdered a member of the New Zealand Nomads, leading to convictions.
